task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into the wger application as 'admin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard or user profile page is visible after entering the credentials on the login page.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the body weight history page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger interface shows a list, table, or chart of body weight entries.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated through the pagination of the history list to find the erroneous entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the body weight history list containing entries with values >150 kg (specifically around 191.8 kg, 190.5 kg, or 192.3 kg).

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the deletion of the erroneous entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking a delete button/icon next to an erroneous entry or interacting with a deletion confirmation dialog.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully deleted all three erroneous entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the body weight history pages where the erroneous entries were previously located, but they are now absent, and no entries > 150 kg are visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Firefox web browser to interact with the wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox browser window is visible with the wger application loaded, rather than using curl or automated API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing database queries (e.g., sqlite3) or script executions related to wger are visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual wger web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks on actual UI elements (buttons, links, pagination) within the wger application to find and delete the entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target erroneous count is 0, meaning all entries > 150 kg must be deleted. The maximum valid weight threshold is 150 kg. The admin username is 'admin'.
